steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a general claim: Singletary “often collaborates with other artists.” The next sentence then provides a specific case: “he has worked with Tewa pottery artist Jody Naranjo several times.”

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: For example directly signals that Naranjo is one concrete instance of the broader collaboration pattern. The other choices misread the relationship: In conclusion suggests the passage is ending, However introduces a false contradiction, and In comparison creates an inappropriate comparison. That matches choice B — B is correct.
